resources.string: Open file (choose Files / My Files for folders)
Open in Chrome for WebXR (+ face)
Relays headset face tracking to OpenNexus3dStudio in Chrome WebXR
Keep this app open while using Chrome WebXR for avatar expressions
Face relay stalled — reopen this app briefly
Chrome WebXR — keep PiP window visible for face relay
Chrome WebXR opened. Leave the small OpenNexus3dStudio window (picture-in-picture) on screen while in Chrome. Run npm run dev on your PC.
PiP is unavailable or failed on this device. For face tracking to work with Chrome, keep this app visible as a panel next to Chrome in the Home Space.
AR/VR does not work inside this WebView. Tap ⋮ → “Open in Chrome for WebXR” for immersive mode, or “Reload page” after dev server updates.
Microphone permission denied — lip sync and getUserMedia audio will not work until you allow it in system Settings.
